prompt_context.ensure_with_safeexec: exists l2, safeExec(ATrue, return(l2), X) && sll(__return, l2)
prompt_context.loop_invariant_with_safeexec: exists l1 l2, safeExec(ATrue, bind(sll_reverse_M_loop(l1,l2), sll_reverse_M_loop_end), X) && sll(prev, l1) * sll(curr, l2)
prompt_context.guard_coq:
fun a =>
  let '(l1, l2) := a in
  l2 <> []

prompt_signatures.M_loop_before: list Z -> MONAD (list Z * list Z)
prompt_signatures.M_loop_body: (list Z * list Z) -> MONAD (CntOrBrk (list Z * list Z) MretTy)
prompt_signatures.M_loop: list Z -> list Z -> program unit (MretTy)
prompt_signatures.M_loop_M2: (list Z * list Z) -> MONAD (list Z * list Z)

template.loop_body_definition:
Definition sll_reverse_M_loop_body : (list Z * list Z) -> MONAD (CntOrBrk (list Z * list Z) MretTy) :=
  fun a =>
    choice (assume!! (~ (sll_reverse_guardP a));; r <- sll_reverse_M_loop_M1 a ;; break r)
           (assume!! ((sll_reverse_guardP a));; a' <- sll_reverse_M_loop_M2 a ;; continue a').
